name: Galaxy Sprite Atlas Capture
description: Inert Galaxy at origin with a backdrop of one yellow sun and three planet billboards. Mirrors centurion_sprite_atlas.json — the Galaxy is non-combat (alive=false skips perception/AI/firing) so the planets and sun are pure scenery for sprite-atlas review (F4) and screenshot work. Galaxy is canonically larger than the Centurion (240 m display vs 120 m), so player_start sits proportionally further out (175 m vs 88 m) to keep the ship comfortably framed.
